message:
Adopt Rust-like idioms in from_mysql operator

Replace verbose error handling with CO_TRY macro for cleaner code:
- Add CO_TRY macro (coroutine-compatible TRY) for error propagation
- Replace std::unique_ptr with Box<T> smart pointer (non-null variant)
- Simplify 11 error handling sites across 4 coroutines
- Extract helper macros with TODO for future consolidation

These changes reduce boilerplate while maintaining safety and clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
